action_set_definitions.name: get_current_date
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current system date in ISO 8601 format to facilitate recency calculations for clinical tests.

action_set_definitions.name: get_prescription_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full details of a pending prescription including medication name, drug class, dosage, and associated patient ID.

prescription_id.description: The unique identifier for the prescription (e.g., RX-2024-BIOL-003).

action_set_definitions.name: get_patient_lab_results
action_set_definitions.description: Fetches the most recent hematological lab results (ANC and Platelets) for a specific patient.

patient_id.description: The unique identifier for the patient.

action_set_definitions.name: get_patient_cardiac_history
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves cardiac monitoring records, specifically the Left Ventricular Ejection Fraction (LVEF) percentage and the date of the test.

patient_id.description: The unique identifier for the patient.

action_set_definitions.name: get_biomarker_profile
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the patient's active treatment profile to check the status of mandatory biomarkers for biological agents.

patient_id.description: The unique identifier for the patient.

action_set_definitions.name: query_diagnostic_documentation
action_set_definitions.description: Accesses external diagnostic reports to reconcile biomarker statuses if they are 'Pending' or 'Unverified' in the main profile.

patient_id.description: The unique identifier for the patient.

biomarker_target.description: The name of the biomarker to search for in documentation.

action_set_definitions.name: submit_verification_decision
action_set_definitions.description: Submits the final verification outcome (Approved, Rejected, or Flagged) and logs the clinical rationale.

prescription_id.description: The unique identifier for the prescription.

state_description.inventory: A mapping of medication IDs to their current stock levels and unit types.
state_description.patient_records: Profiles of patients including known allergies and current active medications to check for interactions.
state_description.prescription_queue: A list of pending prescriptions awaiting verification, including drug name, dosage, and patient ID.
state_description.verification_history: A log of processed prescriptions and their outcome (Approved/Rejected/Flagged).

clinical_notes.content: Biopsy of left breast mass: Infiltrating ductal carcinoma. FISH analysis confirms HER2/neu gene amplification (Ratio 4.2). Diagnosis: HER2 Positive.
